ddls:
CREATE TABLE "animals" (
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the animal */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the animal */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the animal */,
  "collar_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the GPS collar */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the animal */,
  "capture_date" TEXT /* Date when the animal was captured and collared */,
  "capture_location" TEXT /* Location where the animal was captured and collared */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the animal (e.g., healthy, injured) */,
  "last_seen_date" TEXT /* Last date the animal was seen (based on GPS data) */,
  "last_seen_location" TEXT /* Last location the animal was seen (based on GPS data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gps_data" (
  "gps_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPS data point */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "julianday" INTEGER /* Julian day the data was collected */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour the data was collected */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute the data was collected */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the data point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the data point */,
  "hdop" REAL /* Horizontal dilution of position (HDOP) */,
  "num_sats" INTEGER /* Number of satellites used for the fix */,
  "fix_time" INTEGER /* Time to first fix */,
  "dimension" TEXT /* Dimension of the fix (2D or 3D) */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the animal at the time of the GPS fix */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the animal at the time of the GPS fix */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the GPS collar at the time of the GPS fix */,
  "gps_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the GPS fix */,
  "activity_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the activity type (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gps_data_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance of the weather station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station (e.g., ground-based, airborne) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "julianday" INTEGER /* Julian day the data was collected */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour the data was collected */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute the data was collected */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of data collection */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of data collection */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of data collection */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure at the time of data collection */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction at the time of data collection */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation at the time of data collection */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV index at the time of data collection */,
  "data_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the weather data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "camera_traps" (
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera trap */,
  "camera_name" TEXT /* Name of the camera trap */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the camera trap */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the camera trap */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the camera trap was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance of the camera trap */,
  "camera_type" TEXT /* Type of camera trap (e.g., thermal, infrared) */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the camera trap at the time of the image capture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "camera_data" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera trap the image belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the image was taken */,
  "julianday" INTEGER /* Julian day the image was taken */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour the image was taken */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute the image was taken */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the image file */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "image_size" TEXT /* Size of the image file (e.g., 1.2MB) */,
  "detected_species" TEXT /* Species detected in the image (if applicable) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the species detection (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity data point */,
  "gps_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GPS data point the activity belongs to */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., resting, moving, feeding) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "activity_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the activity type (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_gps_id FOREIGN KEY ("gps_id") REFERENCES gps_data ("gps_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, conservationist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the conservation area */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the conservation area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the conservation area */,
  "boundary" TEXT /* Boundary of the conservation area */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the conservation area was established */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of conservation area (e.g., national park, wildlife reserve) */,
  "protected_species" TEXT /* List of protected species in the area (comma-separated) */,
  "management_plan" TEXT /* Path to the management plan document for the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitat" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat */,
  "habitat_name" TEXT /* Name of the habitat */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the habitat */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the habitat */,
  "boundary" TEXT /* Boundary of the habitat */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the habitat was established */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat (e.g., forest, grassland) */,
  "protected_species" TEXT /* List of protected species in the habitat (comma-separated) */,
  "management_plan" TEXT /* Path to the management plan document for the habitat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animal_habitat" (
  "animal_habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal-habitat relationship */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal */,
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the habitat */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the animal was first observed in the habitat */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the animal was last observed in the habitat */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the animal's presence in the habitat (e.g., number of times observed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_habitat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_habitat_habitat_id FOREIGN KEY ("habitat_id") REFERENCES habitat ("habitat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_habitat_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)
